mapper.select:
SELECT csv.community_no AS board_no, csv.title, csv.writer_id, csv.writer_name, TO_CHAR(csv.content_date, 'mm-dd') AS content_date, csv.content_status, csv.view_count, csv.like_count, csv.dislike_count, csv.comment_count, csv.report_count,
CASE WHEN cl.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_liked, CASE WHEN cd.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_disliked, CASE WHEN cc.community_comment_writer IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_commented, CASE WHEN cr.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_reported
FROM community_summary_view csv
LEFT JOIN community_like_tbl cl ON csv.community_no = cl.community_no AND cl.member_id = #{memberId}
LEFT JOIN community_dislike_tbl cd ON csv.community_no = cd.community_no AND cd.member_id = #{memberId}
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT community_no, MAX(community_comment_writer) AS community_comment_writer FROM community_comment_tbl WHERE community_comment_writer = #{memberId} GROUP BY community_no ) cc ON csv.community_no = cc.community_no
LEFT JOIN community_report_tbl cr ON csv.community_no = cr.community_no AND cr.member_id = #{memberId}
csv.title LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
AND csv.writer_id = #{memberId}
AND csv.content_status = #{status}
ORDER BY csv.content_date DESC, csv.community_no DESC
ORDER BY csv.content_date ASC, csv.community_no ASC
ORDER BY csv.view_count DESC, csv.community_no DESC
ORDER BY csv.like_count DESC, csv.community_no DESC
ORDER BY csv.dislike_count DESC, csv.community_no DESC
ORDER BY csv.report_count DESC, csv.community_no DESC
OFFSET #{page} * #{size} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT msv.market_no AS board_no, msv.title, msv.writer_id, msv.writer_name, TO_CHAR(msv.content_date, 'mm-dd') AS content_date, msv.content_status, msv.view_count, msv.like_count, msv.comment_count, msv.report_count, msv.completed AS is_completed, TO_CHAR(msv.completed_date, 'mm-dd') AS completed_date,
CASE WHEN cl.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_liked, CASE WHEN cc.market_comment_writer IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_commented, CASE WHEN cr.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_reported
FROM market_summary_view msv
LEFT JOIN market_like_tbl cl ON msv.market_no = cl.market_no AND cl.member_id = #{memberId}
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT market_no, MAX(market_comment_writer) AS market_comment_writer FROM market_comment_tbl WHERE market_comment_writer = #{memberId} GROUP BY market_no ) cc ON msv.market_no = cc.market_no
LEFT JOIN market_report_tbl cr ON msv.market_no = cr.market_no AND cr.member_id = #{memberId}
msv.title LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
AND msv.writer_id = #{memberId}
AND msv.content_status = #{status}
AND msv.completed = #{completed}
ORDER BY msv.content_date DESC, msv.market_no DESC
ORDER BY msv.content_date ASC, msv.market_no ASC
ORDER BY msv.view_count DESC, msv.market_no DESC
ORDER BY msv.like_count DESC, msv.market_no DESC
ORDER BY msv.report_count DESC, msv.market_no DESC
ORDER BY completed_date DESC NULLS LAST
OFFSET #{page} * #{size} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT mcsv.market_comment_no AS comment_no, mcsv.market_comment_content AS comment_content, mcsv.market_comment_date AS comment_date, mcsv.market_no AS board_no, mcsv.market_comment_writer AS writer_id, mcsv.member_name AS writer_name, mcsv.member_thumb AS writer_thumb, mcsv.report_count,
CASE WHEN cr.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_reported
FROM market_comment_summary_view mcsv
LEFT JOIN market_comment_report_tbl cr ON mcsv.market_comment_no = cr.market_comment_no AND cr.member_id = #{memberId}
mcsv.member_name LIKE '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
AND mcsv.market_comment_writer = #{memberId}
ORDER BY comment_date DESC
ORDER BY comment_date ASC
ORDER BY report_count DESC
OFFSET #{page} * #{size} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT ccsv.community_comment_no AS comment_no, ccsv.community_comment_content AS comment_content, ccsv.community_comment_date AS comment_date, ccsv.community_no AS board_no, ccsv.community_comment_writer AS writer_id, ccsv.member_name AS writer_name, ccsv.member_thumb AS writer_thumb, ccsv.report_count, ccsv.like_count, ccsv.dislike_count,
CASE WHEN cr.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_reported, CASE WHEN cl.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_liked, CASE WHEN cd.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_disliked
FROM community_comment_summary_view ccsv
LEFT JOIN community_comment_report_tbl cr ON ccsv.community_comment_no = cr.community_comment_no AND cr.member_id = #{memberId}
LEFT JOIN community_comment_like_tbl cl ON ccsv.community_comment_no = cl.community_comment_no AND cl.member_id = #{memberId}
LEFT JOIN community_comment_dislike_tbl cd ON ccsv.community_comment_no = cd.community_comment_no AND cd.member_id = #{memberId}
ccsv.member_name LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND ccsv.community_comment_writer = #{memberId}
ORDER BY comment_date DESC
ORDER BY comment_date ASC
ORDER BY report_count DESC
ORDER BY like_count DESC
ORDER BY dislike_count DESC
OFFSET #{page} * #{size} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT r.member_id AS writer_id, r.market_report_reason AS reason, m.member_name AS writer_name FROM market_report_tbl r LEFT JOIN member_tbl m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE market_no = #{boardNo}

SELECT r.member_id AS writer_id, r.community_report_reason AS reason, m.member_name AS writer_name FROM community_report_tbl r LEFT JOIN member_tbl m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE community_no = #{boardNo}

SELECT r.member_id AS writer_id, r.market_comment_report_reason AS reason, m.member_name AS writer_name FROM market_comment_report_tbl r LEFT JOIN member_tbl m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE market_comment_no = #{boardNo}

SELECT r.member_id AS writer_id, r.community_comment_report_reason AS reason, m.member_name AS writer_name FROM community_comment_report_tbl r LEFT JOIN member_tbl m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE community_comment_no = #{boardNo}

SELECT *
FROM (
SELECT msv.market_no AS board_no, 'market' AS board_type, msv.title, msv.writer_id, msv.writer_name, msv.content_date, msv.content_status, msv.view_count, msv.completed AS is_completed, msv.completed_date,
msv.like_count, 0 AS dislike_count, msv.comment_count, msv.report_count,
CASE WHEN cl.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_liked, 0 AS is_disliked, CASE WHEN cc.market_comment_writer IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_commented, CASE WHEN cr.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_reported
FROM market_summary_view msv
LEFT JOIN market_like_tbl cl ON msv.market_no = cl.market_no AND cl.member_id = #{memberId}
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT market_no, MAX(market_comment_writer) AS market_comment_writer FROM market_comment_tbl WHERE market_comment_writer = #{memberId} GROUP BY market_no ) cc ON msv.market_no = cc.market_no
LEFT JOIN market_report_tbl cr ON msv.market_no = cr.market_no AND cr.member_id = #{memberId}
WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM market_like_tbl mkl WHERE mkl.market_no = msv.market_no AND mkl.member_id = #{memberId} )
UNION ALL
SELECT csv.community_no AS board_no, 'community' AS board_type, csv.title, csv.writer_id, csv.writer_name, csv.content_date, csv.content_status, csv.view_count, NULL AS is_completed, NULL AS completed_date,
csv.like_count, csv.dislike_count, csv.comment_count, csv.report_count,
CASE WHEN cl.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_liked, CASE WHEN cd.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_disliked, CASE WHEN cc.community_comment_writer IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_commented, CASE WHEN cr.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_reported
FROM community_summary_view csv
LEFT JOIN community_like_tbl cl ON csv.community_no = cl.community_no AND cl.member_id = #{memberId}
LEFT JOIN community_dislike_tbl cd ON csv.community_no = cd.community_no AND cd.member_id = #{memberId}
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT community_no, MAX(community_comment_writer) AS community_comment_writer FROM community_comment_tbl WHERE community_comment_writer = #{memberId} GROUP BY community_no ) cc ON csv.community_no = cc.community_no
LEFT JOIN community_report_tbl cr ON csv.community_no = cr.community_no AND cr.member_id = #{memberId}
WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM community_like_tbl cml WHERE cml.community_no = csv.community_no AND cml.member_id = #{memberId} ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM community_dislike_tbl cmd WHERE cmd.community_no = csv.community_no AND cmd.member_id = #{memberId} )
)
content_status = 1
AND is_liked = 1
AND is_disliked = 1
ORDER BY content_date DESC
ORDER BY content_date ASC
ORDER BY view_count DESC, board_no DESC
ORDER BY like_count DESC, board_no DESC
ORDER BY dislike_count DESC, board_no DESC
ORDER BY report_count DESC, board_no DESC
OFFSET #{page} * #{size} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) AS count
FROM (
SELECT msv.market_no AS board_no, 'market' AS board_type, msv.title, msv.writer_id, msv.writer_name, msv.content_date, msv.content_status, msv.view_count, msv.completed AS is_completed, msv.completed_date,
msv.like_count, 0 AS dislike_count, msv.comment_count, msv.report_count,
CASE WHEN cl.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_liked, 0 AS is_disliked, CASE WHEN cc.market_comment_writer IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_commented, CASE WHEN cr.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_reported
FROM market_summary_view msv
LEFT JOIN market_like_tbl cl ON msv.market_no = cl.market_no AND cl.member_id = #{memberId}
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT market_no, MAX(market_comment_writer) AS market_comment_writer FROM market_comment_tbl WHERE market_comment_writer = #{memberId} GROUP BY market_no ) cc ON msv.market_no = cc.market_no
LEFT JOIN market_report_tbl cr ON msv.market_no = cr.market_no AND cr.member_id = #{memberId}
WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM market_like_tbl mkl WHERE mkl.market_no = msv.market_no AND mkl.member_id = #{memberId} )
UNION ALL
SELECT csv.community_no AS board_no, 'community' AS board_type, csv.title, csv.writer_id, csv.writer_name, csv.content_date, csv.content_status, csv.view_count, NULL AS is_completed, NULL AS completed_date,
csv.like_count, csv.dislike_count, csv.comment_count, csv.report_count,
CASE WHEN cl.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_liked, CASE WHEN cd.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_disliked, CASE WHEN cc.community_comment_writer IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_commented, CASE WHEN cr.member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_reported
FROM community_summary_view csv
LEFT JOIN community_like_tbl cl ON csv.community_no = cl.community_no AND cl.member_id = #{memberId}
LEFT JOIN community_dislike_tbl cd ON csv.community_no = cd.community_no AND cd.member_id = #{memberId}
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT community_no, MAX(community_comment_writer) AS community_comment_writer FROM community_comment_tbl WHERE community_comment_writer = #{memberId} GROUP BY community_no ) cc ON csv.community_no = cc.community_no
LEFT JOIN community_report_tbl cr ON csv.community_no = cr.community_no AND cr.member_id = #{memberId}
WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM community_like_tbl cml WHERE cml.community_no = csv.community_no AND cml.member_id = #{memberId} ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM community_dislike_tbl cmd WHERE cmd.community_no = csv.community_no AND cmd.member_id = #{memberId} )
)
content_status = 1
AND is_liked = 1
AND is_disliked = 1

SELECT TO_CHAR(market_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS market_date, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN completed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN completed = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS incompleted_count FROM market_tbl
market_date >= #{start} AND market_date < #{end} + 1
AND completed = #{complete}
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(market_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY market_date ASC

SELECT market_no, market_title, sell_addr, sell_price, completed, TO_CHAR(completed_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS completed_date
FROM market_tbl
market_date >= #{start} AND market_date < #{end} + 1
AND completed = #{complete}
ORDER BY market_no DESC
OFFSET #{page} * #{size} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
